Once upon a time there was a little cat who loved the warm sun.
The cat played all day and slept all night under a big tree.
One day a happy dog came to play and they became best friends.
They ran across the green field and laughed in the bright light.
The little cat and the happy dog shared a small piece of bread.
At night the stars came out and the two friends looked up and smiled.
One morning the cat woke up and stretched in the warm sun.
The dog barked with joy and wagged his tail very fast.
They walked to the pond and watched the little fish swim by.
A soft wind blew through the trees and the leaves danced around.
The cat found a red ball and rolled it across the grass.
The dog chased the ball and brought it back with a happy bark.
Soon it was time for lunch and they shared some warm milk.
After lunch they rested under the big tree in the cool shade.
The sun began to set and the sky turned pink and orange.
The little cat yawned and curled up next to her best friend.
The happy dog closed his eyes and listened to the birds sing.
Night came slowly and the whole meadow grew quiet and still.
The stars twinkled above as the two friends fell fast asleep.
In the morning they woke up ready for a brand new day.
They walked into town and saw a kind old woman baking bread.
She gave the cat and the dog a small warm piece each.
The cat purred with joy and the dog wagged his tail again.
They thanked the woman and continued on their little adventure.
Down the road they found a stream with clear cool water.
The dog jumped in and splashed while the cat watched and laughed.
Soon they were both tired and lay down in the soft grass.
A gentle breeze cooled them down as clouds drifted slowly by.
When evening came they walked home together side by side.
That night they slept soundly, happy for such a wonderful day.
